decisions.decision: Seeds use `mix run priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` without KILN_DB_ROLE override
decisions.rationale: kiln_owner role can't SELECT on workflow_definition_snapshots (only kiln_app can); dev runs as superuser `kiln` which has access to both.

decisions.decision: Playwright matrix = 4 projects (desktop-chromium x {light,dark}, mobile-safari x {light,dark}), not 2 browsers x 2 themes via per-test fixtures
decisions.rationale: Playwright's native `colorScheme` + `viewport` per-project gives much better reporting and parallelism than spec-level params.

decisions.decision: axe scan fails only on serious/critical, not moderate/minor
decisions.rationale: Matches brand book's contrast-first posture; moderate/minor are reported in traces but don't gate merge.

decisions.decision: `mix kiln.ui.lint` uses pure string scan, not `rg` shell-out as originally proposed
decisions.rationale: No dependency on rg being installed; runs under Elixir BEAM which is already required; supports `# kiln-ui-lint:allow` line-level escape hatch.

decisions.decision: Layer 1 test file refute list matches Layer 2 lint list exactly
decisions.rationale: Two independent gates on the same token set — HTML-rendered (Layer 1) + source-level (Layer 2) — so regressions surface on any code path.

uncommitted_files.note: Broader working-tree mods from the prior Phase reskin session (lib/kiln_web/**, assets/css/app.css) are already staged/untracked from before this session — not introduced here.

next_action: Run `mix check` cold and fix any fallout, then `mix kiln.e2e` to confirm Playwright goes green end-to-end. After that, commit & push to trigger CI across all three jobs.
